title: List of biocides for exceptional importation and sale - Canada.ca
content:
## List of biocides for exceptional importation and sale
- List of designated biocides
Biocides included  on this list are called " designated biocides. " They are  currently eligible for exceptional importation and sale. Health Canada, which maintains the list, will  update it as required.
Supersedes: 2021-10-20 Date issued: 2022-03-02 Access archived versions of this list
